tool.name: SameStr Stats
tool.description: Generate statistics for SameStr variant profiles including coverage and diversity metrics
tool.command:
mkdir -p out_stats/ &&
#set $input_filename = $input_files.name #set $names_filename = $input_names.name
cp '$input_files' '$input_filename' && cp '$input_names' '$names_filename' &&
samestr stats --marker-dir '$database.fields.path' --input-files '$input_filename' --input-names '$names_filename' --output-dir out_stats/ $dominant_variants

param.name: input_names
param.label: Sample identifiers
param.help: Text file listing the sample/gene identifiers.

param.name: database
param.label: SameStr database
param.help: SameStr database built from MetaPhlAn or mOTUS markers

param.label: Report statistics only for dominant variants
param.help: Calculate statistics based on consensus/dominant variants only, ignoring minority variants (default: False).

tool.help:
**SameStr Stats**
SameStr Stats generates statistics for nucleotide variant profiles, including coverage metrics, nucleotide diversity, and filtering summaries.
**Input Requirements**
SameStr Stats analyzes merged or filtered SNV profile files. For each analysis, the following inputs must be provided: - A SNV profile file in NPZ/NPY format (.npz, .npy, or .npy.gz) generated by samestr filter. - Corresponding sample identifier file in text format (.names.txt) generated by samestr filter. - The MetaPhlAn or mOTUS clade marker database that matches the database used throughout the workflow.
**Parameters**
- Report statistics only for dominant variants: Calculate metrics based on consensus/dominant variants only, ignoring minority variants.
**Results and Outputs**
- Command log (JSON format). A detailed execution log of the statistics process. - Alignment statistics file. Statistical summary of the clade, providing per-sample metrics.
